name: WordPress
description: The open source publishing platform of choice for millions of websites worldwide
compose:
name: slashnode-wordpress
services:
  app:
    image: wordpress:7.0
    container_name: wordpress-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      WORDPRESS_DB_HOST: wordpress-db
      WORDPRESS_DB_NAME: wordpress
      WORDPRESS_DB_USER: umbrel
      WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD: umbrelwordpress
    volumes:
      - app_data-wordpress:/var/www/html
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8567:80
  db:
    image: mariadb:11.5.2
    container_name: wordpress-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: umbrelwordpressroot
      MYSQL_DATABASE: wordpress
      MYSQL_USER: umbrel
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: umbrelwordpress
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/mysql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-wordpress:
    name: slashnode-wordpress_app_data-wordpress
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-wordpress_db_data-db
